name: agentbox-skills
description: Base Agentbox read, write, and prerequisite-check tools for OpenClaw dialogue-driven gameplay.
author: jingyizou

CUSTODY_STORE_PATH.description: Directory used to store the local hosted registration wallet file

SIGNER_STORE_PATH.description: Directory used to store the single local gameplay private key file

MIN_NATIVE_BALANCE_ETH.description: Minimum ETH balance required before hosted registration continues

INDEXER_BASE_URL.description: Optional indexer base URL used for aggregated reads

EXPLORER_API_KEY.description: Explorer API key used for contract source verification

EXPLORER_BROWSER_BASE_URL.description: Explorer browser base URL used for contract links
